title: Cryptool unveils a new landing page built around one-click crypto management
content_html:
Cryptool has rolled out a new landing page at cryptool.io.

The redesign is built around the single product idea that drives the platform: one-click crypto management for individual investors and fund managers. It pulls the message together in one place and gives any visitor a fast answer to "what does Cryptool do, and who is it for".

This is the first public-facing piece of the platform. The modules behind it follow over the coming weeks.
author: Cryptool
